title: Chief of Staff / Principal to the CEO (f/m/d)
required_skills: 3-5 years at top-tier strategy consultancy (McKinsey, BCG, Bain) or equivalent (top PE/VC/IB into operating role)
Top-tier university degree, top 20% of graduating class, technical/quantitative or renowned business school
Proven ability to incubate and implement innovation strategies (built something from blank page to working business)
English at native or near-native level — board memos, investor decks, CEO correspondence
Strategic horsepower paired with operating instinct (market sizing + unblocking processes)
bonus_skills: Experience living/working in US and/or Japan with cultural fluency
Familiarity with enterprise software, SAP ecosystem, AI/ML or system integrator landscape
matched_skills: Strategic analysis and market research (ECE Group: competitive analysis and market sizing, GRG: portfolio gap analysis)
Executive-ready reporting and stakeholder communication (HSBC: C-suite reports, VfB Stuttgart: board-level KPI framework)
German B1 — partial match for German language bonus
missing_skills: Top-tier strategy consultancy background (McKinsey, BCG, Bain or equivalent PE/VC/IB)
Top 20% graduation class from top-tier university (verifiable ranking)
Venture building or corporate incubation track record
Native/near-native English level (Boru is C1, not native)
International entity setup or M&A analysis experience
SAP ecosystem or enterprise software knowledge
core_responsibilities: Lead deep-dive strategy and market analysis on AI transformation and competitive positioning
Build new ventures around AI-native SAP transformation from blank page to go-to-market
Drive international entity build-out (Brazil, Japan): legal structuring, recruiting, market entry plans
Prepare board materials, investor briefings and NTT alignment documents
Filter, prioritise and quarterback the CEO agenda
Execute special strategic projects with high ownership and speed
recommended_emphasis: ECE Group: Competitive analysis and market sizing packaged into executive reports — closest analogue to the strategy analysis function
HSBC: C-suite data storytelling and programme governance — demonstrates executive communication capability
IPC/GRG: GTM strategy and multi-market product launch execution — evidences operating instinct dimension
summary: Boru scores 17.6 (poor match) for this highly selective Chief of Staff role targeting top-tier strategy consultants or equivalent with Tier-1 university credentials. The role's explicit hard filter — McKinsey/BCG/Bain background or top PE/VC equivalent — is not met by Boru's CV, and the venture building, M&A analysis and international entity setup experience required are absent. Application is not recommended; this is a fundamentally different career track.
